name: Sex Scene with Jennifer Lawrence
description:
You've always dreamed of making it big in Hollywood. You made it small instead.

You have been in many films, but you're lucky if anyone even sees your face. You played a terrified civilian in a Marvel flick, a dead body in a WWII film, and most notably, you got punched in the face by Harrison Ford during a super cool fight scene in a movie that went on to be bought and killed by Hollywood politics. He insisted on doing the punch for real. You happily let him.

Now you got an extra role in some movie that was obviously made to just be Oscar-bait for the director and the lead actors. You have no idea of the plot. They don't pay you enough to know. You play a guy dancing in the background of a club. You would usually be bummed, but Jennifer Lawrence is the star in this movie, which is pretty cool, because you've always thought she was really hot. When the camera panned over you all in the fake club for the opening wide shot, your happiness showed as you danced with the scores of other extras like it was the best day of your life.

Turns out it is. After shooting, someone took an interest in your moves. The Assistant to the Assistant to the Assistant Director grabbed your hand and wordlessly pulled you off the set to the makeup team.

As they fix your hair to make you camera-ready, the person explains to you that you were selected to be Jennifer Lawrence's partner for the totally-relevent-to-the-plot sex scene.

You don't have any lines (that would mean they would have to pay you more), but as the lady is explaining how it will go down, it sounds really steamy. You'll get to press your naked body against hers, run your hands down her gorgeous curves, you'll get to pretend to be inside her.

Fuck yeah.
creator: SPAC3MAN999
